summary: Full backend + frontend E2E test of Cargo Ops PWA. 12/12 pytest tests passed. All critical user flows verified across Home, Admin (PIN gate, tabs, setup, manifest, earnings, status pill), Farm (kit chips, check-in/loaded gating), Nairobi (coord picker, extract gated by loaded), and Settings (coordinators + WhatsApp templates). PWA manifest.json + sw.js served with correct theme_color #1D6B5A.

minor.issue: Create endpoints return HTTP 200 instead of conventional 201. Functional but a minor REST convention deviation; frontend works with it.
Unused helper clean() in server.py — dead code. Mongo _id is already excluded via projections, so this is harmless.

verified_flows: GET /api/health -> ok
Trip CRUD + cascade delete (trucks + sellers removed)
PIN verify returns valid true/false correctly
Truck limit of 10 enforced — 11th returns 400
Color auto-assign sequence red->blue->yellow->green->orange->purple and cycles back to red on 7th
Seller flag updates (checked_in, loaded, extraction_confirmed)
seed-coordinators is idempotent (returns seeded:false on 2nd call)
Manifest aggregation: total_units, seller_count, *_count fields correct; nairobi coord earnings = trucks_completed * 1000
Home: create trip form, navigates to /trip/{id}
Admin PIN gate: wrong PIN shows 'Wrong PIN', correct PIN unlocks and reveals 3 tabs
Admin Setup tab: Add Truck form (coord dropdown populated with 2 Nairobi seeds), Add Seller with red chip auto-assigned (chip-red testid present)
Admin Manifest tab: truck card visible with status pill
Admin Earnings tab: 2 Nairobi coordinator rows visible
Trip status pill advances booking_open -> confirmed on tap
Farm view: 6 kit chips rendered, Loaded button disabled until Check In is clicked, becomes enabled after
Nairobi view: coord picker shows 2 Nairobi coords, earnings card shows 'KSH 0' initially with truck count
Nairobi extract button enabled once seller.loaded=true
Settings page: coordinator list (Mwangi/Wanjiku/Kamau) + WhatsApp templates with Copy buttons visible
PWA manifest.json: name 'Cargo Ops', theme_color '#1D6B5A', icons present
PWA sw.js: served with content-type application/javascript, 200 OK
critical_code_review_comments: Backend server.py is ~420 lines — acceptable for current MVP size; consider splitting models into a separate module if it grows.
AdminTrip.js is ~750 lines — consider splitting TruckForm, SellerForm, SetupTruckBlock, ManifestTruckCard into their own files for maintainability.
next_color_for_truck() correctly handles distinct-then-cycle behavior; verified with 7-seller cycle test.
DELETE cascade on trips/trucks is correct.
CORS uses '*' default — acceptable for PWA but consider restricting in production.
FastAPI on_event('shutdown') is deprecated in newer FastAPI; consider switching to lifespan handlers (non-blocking, low priority).
test_credentials: Admin PIN: 1234 (default for new trips). No global auth.
seed_data_creation: Test trip created via UI (id captured) + test coordinator (TEST_NBO_*) created/deleted in backend tests. Backend test fixtures auto-cleanup created trips. One leftover trip created during UI test for /trip/{id}/farm and nairobi navigation — main agent may want to delete it via UI or DB if undesired.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All endpoints and primary user flows pass. Color cycling, PIN gate, cascade deletes, manifest aggregation, earnings calc, and the check-in -> loaded -> extracted gating chain all confirmed. PWA manifest and SW are valid. The frontend's polling could be revalidated cross-tab (10s sync) but functional checks already verified state updates via refresh() after each mutation.
